message:
refactor(storage,ui,security): migrate analytics/TUI/batch writes to frankensqlite, zeroize key material

Continue the rusqlite-to-frankensqlite migration across analytics,
TUI, batch writes, and key management:

Storage (sqlite.rs):
- New FrankenStorage impl block with rebuild_analytics() and
  rebuild_daily_stats() using frankensqlite APIs (query_map_collect,
  fparams, Row::get_typed, transactions via self.conn.transaction())
- Batch write functions migrated: update_daily_stats_batched_in_tx,
  insert_token_usage_batched_in_tx, update_token_daily_stats_batched_in_tx,
  insert_message_metrics_batched_in_tx, flush_rollup_table,
  flush_model_daily_rollup_table

TUI (ui/app.rs, ui/data.rs):
- All SqliteStorage references replaced with FrankenStorage
- load_conversation_uncached migrated from prepare/query/next to
  query_map_collect, now also reads metadata_bin (msgpack fallback)

Key management (pages/key_management.rs):
- All DEK/KEK byte arrays wrapped in zeroize::Zeroizing<> for
  automatic zeroize-on-drop
- derive_kek_argon2id and derive_kek_hkdf return Zeroizing<[u8; 32]>
- key_rotate wraps old_dek, new_dek, plaintext in Zeroizing
- Eliminates manual .zeroize() calls throughout

Remaining renames:
- daemon/worker.rs, lib.rs, pages/export.rs: SqliteStorage -> FrankenStorage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
